L. 110–457, title III, § 303122 Stat. 5087Dec. 23, 2008“The amendments made by sections 301 and 302 [amending this section, sections 20701 to 20703 and 20705 of Title 34, Crime Control and Law Enforcement, and provisions set out as a note under ] may not be construed to affect the availability of funds appropriated pursuant to the authorizations of appropriations under the Trafficking Victims Protection Act of 2000 (division A of ; et seq.) and the Trafficking Victims Protection Reauthorization Act of 2005 () [see Tables for classification] before the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 7105 of this titlePublic Law 106–38622 U.S.C. 7101Public Law 109–164Dec. 23, 2008

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations in support of the task force
children.label: a Authorization of appropriations in support of the task force
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Department of State, for each of the fiscal years 2018 through 2021, $13,822,000 for Diplomatic and Consular Programs of the Office to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons, which shall be used to carry out sections 7103(e), 7103(f), and 7107 of this title, including for additional personnel.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of Health and Human Services
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of Health and Human Services

children.heading: Eligibility for benefits and assistance
children.label: 1 Eligibility for benefits and assistance
children.text: To carry out the purposes of sections 7104(b) and 7105(b) of this title and , there are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Health and Human Services $19,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 2018 through 2021, of which $3,500,000 is authorized to be appropriated for each fiscal year for the National Human Trafficking Hotline.section 628c of title 42

children.heading: Additional benefits for trafficking victims
children.label: 2 Additional benefits for trafficking victims
children.text: To carry out the purposes of section 7105(f) of this title, there are authorized to be appropriated $8,000,000 to the Secretary of Health and Human Services for each of the fiscal years 2023 through 2028.1

children.heading: Grants for State improvements
children.label: 3 Grants for State improvements
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated $4,000,000 to the Secretary of Health and Human Services for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2027.section 20705a of title 34

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of State
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of State
A
children.text: to carry out sections 7104 and 7105(a) of this title;

children.label: B
children.text: to carry out ;section 2152d of this title

children.label: C
children.text: to assist countries in meeting the minimum standards described in ; andsection 7106 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: for programs and activities on prevention, protection, and prosecution to combat all forms of trafficking in persons internationally, including training activities for law enforcement officers, prosecutors, and members of the judiciary with respect to trafficking in persons at the International Law Enforcement Academies.

children.heading: Preparation of annual country reports on human rights
children.label: 2 Preparation of annual country reports on human rights
children.text: To carry out the purposes of sections 2151n(f) and 2304(h) of this title, there are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of State such sums as may be necessary to include the additional information required by that section in the annual Country Reports on Human Rights Practices.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to Attorney General
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations to Attorney General

children.heading: Eligibility for benefits and assistance
children.label: 1 Eligibility for benefits and assistance
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated to the Attorney General $77,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2018 through 2021.section 7105(b) of this title

children.heading: Assistance to foreign countries
children.label: 2 Assistance to foreign countries
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated to the President, acting through the Attorney General and the Secretary of State, $250,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2011 to carry out training activities for law enforcement officers, prosecutors, and members of the judiciary with respect to trafficking in persons at the International Law Enforcement Academies.section 2152d of this title

children.heading: Additional benefits for trafficking victims
children.label: 3 Additional benefits for trafficking victims
children.text: To carry out the purposes of section 7105(f) of this title, there are authorized to be appropriated $11,000,000 to the Attorney General for each of the fiscal years 2023 through 2028.1

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to President
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations to President

children.heading: Foreign victim assistance
children.label: 1 Foreign victim assistance
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated to the President $7,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 2014 through 2017.section 7104 of this title

children.heading: Assistance to foreign countries to meet minimum standards
children.label: 2 Assistance to foreign countries to meet minimum standards
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated to the President $7,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 2014 through 2017.section 2152d of this title

children.heading: Research
children.label: 3 Research
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated to the President $2,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2022 through 2027.section 7109a of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of Labor
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of Labor
children.text: To carry out the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Labor $5,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2023 through 2028.section 7105(b) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on use of funds
children.label: g Limitation on use of funds

children.heading: Restriction on programs
children.label: 1 Restriction on programs
children.text: No funds made available to carry out this chapter, or any amendment made by this chapter, may be used to promote, support, or advocate the legalization or practice of prostitution. Nothing in the preceding sentence shall be construed to preclude assistance designed to promote the purposes of this Act by ameliorating the suffering of, or health risks to, victims while they are being trafficked or after they are out of the situation that resulted from such victims being trafficked.

children.heading: Restriction on organizations
children.label: 2 Restriction on organizations
children.text: No funds made available to carry out this chapter, or any amendment made by this chapter, may be used to implement any program that targets victims of severe forms of trafficking in persons described in section 7102(9)(A) of this title through any organization that has not stated in either a grant application, a grant agreement, or both, that it does not promote, support, or advocate the legalization or practice of prostitution. The preceding sentence shall not apply to organizations that provide services to individuals solely after they are no longer engaged in activities that resulted from such victims being trafficked.1

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to Director of the FBI
children.label: h Authorization of appropriations to Director of the FBI
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation $15,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2008 through 2011, to remain available until expended, to investigate severe forms of trafficking in persons.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of Homeland Security
children.label: i Authorization of appropriations to the Secretary of Homeland Security
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Homeland Security, $10,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2023 through 2028, to remain available until expended, of which $2,000,000 shall be made available each fiscal year for the establishment of a labor trafficking investigation team within the Department of Homeland Security Center for Countering Human Trafficking, and the remaining funds shall be used for investigations by the Bureau of Immigration and Customs Enforcement of severe forms of trafficking in persons.2So in original. The comma probably should not appear.2
